original_snippet_context: A letter discussing the coffee valorization plan and its relationship to the Caixa Economica.
relevant_quote: o valor do café o a Caixa Economica foi o unico factor que serviu de base ao accordo que toma venio concluido pelos governos f[ILLEGIBLE WORD]deraes, dos Estados de S. Paulo e Rio
justification: This quote mentions the "Caixa Economica" in the context of the coffee valorization plan and an agreement between government entities. It presents this information as a factual element without expressing explicit support or criticism of any particular monetary policy.
